
Equivalent manual steps (smith):
  1. Check that required tools are installed (git, VS Code, PowerShell)
  2. Verify VS Code settings for Copilot agent mode
  3. Validate .forge.json and file counts per preset
  4. Check version currency against Plan Forge source
  5. Scan for common problems (duplicates, orphans, broken references)

螕貌脺螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌脡螕貌楼

Environment:
  螕拢脿 git 2.53.0.windows.3
  螕拢脿 code (VS Code CLI) found
  螕拢脿 PowerShell 7.6.1 (pwsh) 螕脟枚 running shell is 5.1.26100.8457; pwsh is preferred
  螕拢脿 gh (GitHub CLI) 2.92.0

Runtime & Worker Readiness:
  螕拢脿 git v2.53.0
  螕拢脿 gh v2.92.0
  螕拢脿 node v24.11.1
  螕拢脿 pwsh v7.6.1
  螕拢脿 gh-copilot v1.0.49 (agentic capable)
  螕脺谩鈭┾晻脜  claude not found on PATH (agent worker)
     FIX: winget install Anthropic.Claude   (or npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code)
  螕楼卯 copilot-coding-agent v lacks agentic flags: Logged in to github.com (issue #28)
     FIX: winget upgrade --id GitHub.cli && gh auth login
  螕脺谩鈭┾晻脜  codex not found on PATH (agent worker)
     FIX: npm install -g @openai/codex

VS Code Configuration:
  螕楼卯 .vscode/settings.json has invalid JSON
     FIX: Fix the JSON syntax in .vscode/settings.json

Setup Health:
  螕楼卯 .forge.json not found
     FIX: Run 'pforge init' to bootstrap your project
  螕拢脿 .github/copilot-instructions.md exists

Version Currency:
  螕脺谩鈭┾晻脜  Cannot determine installed version (.forge.json missing templateVersion)
     (cached 192m ago)

Auto-update:
  螕拢脿 Auto-update: disabled (opt-in) | Cache age: no cache | Last tag: unknown | Last check: never
     Tip: Run 'pforge self-update' to check + install, or 'pforge smith --refresh-version-cache' to clear cache

MCP Server:
  螕拢脿 pforge-mcp/server.mjs exists
  螕拢脿 MCP dependencies installed
  螕拢脿 .vscode/mcp.json has 'plan-forge' server entry

Image Generation:
  螕拢脿 sharp installed (WebP, PNG, AVIF conversion)
  螕脺谩鈭┾晻脜  No image API keys configured
     FIX: Set XAI_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY env var, or add to .forge/secrets.json
  螕拢脿 Node.js v24.11.1 (sharp requires >= 18.17)

MCP Runtime:
  螕拢脿 MCP SDK (protocol layer) v1.29.0
  螕拢脿 Express (dashboard + REST API) v5.2.1
  螕拢脿 ws (WebSocket hub for real-time events) v8.20.0
  螕拢脿 Playwright (screenshot capture)
  螕拢脿 MCP server version v3.7.0 matches VERSION file
  螕拢脿 forge-master-routes.mjs (Phase-29 route wiring)
  螕拢脿 tools.json + cli-schema.json (92 MCP tools registered)

Dashboard:
  螕拢脿 dashboard/index.html
  螕拢脿 dashboard/app.js
  螕拢脿 dashboard/forge-master.js (Forge-Master Studio tab)

  螕拢脿 7/7 lifecycle hooks present (core + LiveGuard)

  螕拢脿 Extension catalog valid ( extension(s))
  螕拢脿 Spec Kit compatible

  螕拢脿 VERSION: 3.7.0
  螕拢脿 CHANGELOG.md present (framework v3.7.0 螕脟枚 downstream CHANGELOG tracks your app, not pforge)

  螕拢脿 No common problems detected

  螕拢脿 Orchestrator ready 螕脟枚 use 'pforge run-plan <plan>' to execute a plan
  螕拢脿 pforge-mcp/orchestrator.mjs present

  螕拢脿 92 MCP tools (14 LiveGuard) in tools.json

  螕拢脿 Crucible inactive 螕脟枚 no .forge/crucible/ directory yet

  螕拢脿 Tempering inactive 螕脟枚 no .forge/tempering/ directory yet
